stepsCompleted.docNote: Added /tasks Kanban board page with 3 columns (To Do, In Progress, Done), optimistic status transitions via buttons, new task creation form in To Do column, and Task Board nav link in NavBar. E2E test covers create → move → reload → persist lifecycle.

Added fn-tasks.ts with 3 HTTP triggers (GET/POST/PATCH) for Kanban task CRUD backed by Cosmos DB Tasks container. Uses DefaultAzureCredential, lazy-init singleton CosmosClient, workspace task limit (MAX_TASKS_PER_WORKSPACE=500). Added @azure/cosmos and @azure/identity to backend deps (were missing despite spec claim). Updated deploy-backend.yml with app settings step, validate-app.sh with GET /tasks health check.

No dead code found. All kanban-task-board feature files verified clean:
- packages/schemas/src/tasks.ts: All 4 schema exports + 4 type exports consumed by backend, frontend, and tests
- backend/src/functions/fn-tasks.ts: All 3 handlers (listTasks, createTask, updateTaskStatus) registered as Azure Functions + exported for unit tests (30 passing tests)
- frontend/src/app/tasks/page.tsx: All components (TaskCard, KanbanColumn, TasksPage) used internally, all imports live
- packages/schemas/src/index.ts: All barrel exports consumed
- No orphaned files, no commented-out code blocks, no unused imports
- Pre-existing code (apiClient.ts mapApiErrorCode, ApiErrorCode, ApiErrorCodeSchema) all verified as actively consumed

summaryIntents: Deterministic CI poll — all workflows passed
